categories.summary: The chat segment is extremely brief, containing only a single message from user "marlus". The message indicates that marlus was inspired by another Discord user (identified by ID 735663632356212887) and is experimenting with a new API for agent building. Marlus shared a link to their X (formerly Twitter) post about this work. No technical discussions, decisions, or problem-solving occurred in this limited segment.

ToxSam - IBIH announced the development of a new platform called 3danvil.com that enables users to mint 3D assets (GLB and VRM formats) on the Solana blockchain with Arweave storage in a single process. The platform supports various minting options including launches, Dutch auctions, and collection/1:1 mints, though direct sales for 1:1 mints aren't supported on the platform itself. The site also includes a registry for implementing assets into other projects. The platform is still in development with mobile functionality not yet complete.
